creator: sue@welearn.com.au
text:
On Mon, Nov 16, 1998 at 01:08:13AM -0800, bago@datasail.it wrote:
> 
> I cannot find mc binaries after the installation.

They're there :-)
The name has changed from mc to midc, but that's not very obvious.

A lot of people have thought the port was broken. Of course 'man mc'
doesn't work either. Maybe the installation should display a notice
that you have to type 'midc' now.

-- 

Regards,
        -*Sue*-
